'''Saber Enterprises''' appeared to be a legitimate corporation headed by [[Renik]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], but in fact it was a front for much of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] counter-espionage operations.

==History==
[[Guri]], following orders by [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], paid 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Viera Cheran|chief mechanic]] on the moon of [[Kile]] in order to program [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson's]] [[Unidentified R2 unit (Wes Janson)|R2]] droid to shoot [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

The payment followed such routes so that it appeared that it ultimately traced to Saber Enterprises, showing that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] supposedly wanted Luke dead.

{{Company-stub}}
